identity.name: Acadia Safe Dashboard
identity.description: A high-contrast, density-optimized security dashboard for real-time emergency monitoring. It blends 'Swiss Style' clarity with 'Tactical UI' precision.

styles.label: font-sans font-bold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500

cards.default: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm p-5
cards.tactical: bg-white border border-slate-200 border-l-4 border-l-[#0d1b2a] rounded-r-lg shadow-sm p-4
cards.alert: bg-red-50 border border-red-200 border-l-4 border-l-red-600 rounded-r-lg shadow-sm p-4 animate-pulse-subtle

buttons.primary: h-10 px-4 py-2 bg-[#0d1b2a] text-white rounded-md font-medium hover:bg-[#1b263b] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-[#0d1b2a]
buttons.destructive: h-10 px-4 py-2 bg-[#e53e3e] text-white rounded-md font-medium hover:bg-red-700 transition-colors
buttons.outline: h-10 px-4 py-2 border border-slate-300 bg-transparent hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: h-10 px-4 py-2 hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

general: Follow the 'Tactical UI' aesthetic: clean lines, high contrast, information density.
Use 'Navy (#0d1b2a)' for the sidebar and 'Light (#f7fafc)' for the main content area.
Ensure all critical alerts (SOS) use the 'Emergency Red (#e53e3e)' color and a pulsing effect.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all data points (IDs, coords, timestamps) to enhance the security feel.
Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use flat colors or subtle borders.
All interactive elements MUST have a `data-testid` attribute.
layout_rules: Sidebar is fixed width (w-64) on desktop, hidden behind hamburger on mobile.
Main content area must have padding (p-6 or p-8).
Use a grid system for the dashboard widgets (Bento Grid Mode B).
Cards should have a consistent height where possible in the grid.
component_rules: Use Shadcn UI components as the base but customize the styling to match the 'Tactical' theme.
For the Kanban board (Escorts Page), ensure columns are distinct and cards are draggable.
For the Map Widget, use a placeholder image if the actual map library setup is complex, but prefer `react-leaflet` integration.

universal_guidelines: You tends to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }`.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
